Once upon a time, there was a little girl named Lily. She loved to play outside in the sunshine. One day, she saw a big puddle on the ground. It was very pretty and had lots of colors.
Lily asked her mom, "Can I have some purple please?" Her mom said yes and they started to play. But then they heard a loud noise. Suddenly, a kind lady appeared and asked her what was wrong. The lady said, "I'm sorry, you are going to be able to take care of it."

But then, something unexpected happened. A big wind came and blew the bird away from the tree. The bird was sad and scared. Lily and Tom looked at each other and said, "I'm sorry, I didn't know how to get back home." The bird said, "It's okay, we can fix it." And they all lived happily ever after.

Lily asked her mom if she could play with it, but her mom said no because it was too high for her. So, Lily went inside and sat down to rest. She saw a big puddle of water and put it on her hands. Her mom smiled and said, "That's a great idea!"
